hooks.description: memcord: auto-save progress before context compaction
hooks.prompt: The conversation context is about to be compacted. Use the memcord_save_progress tool to save a summary of the current conversation. Pass the key points, decisions, code changes, and progress from this session as the chat_text parameter. Do NOT specify a slot_name — let the server auto-detect it. If the save fails because no slot is active, silently continue. Do not ask the user for confirmation.
